examples: The probable cause of his death is traceable to an incident in 1724.
Ms Brooks may or may not have had suspicions about how her journalists got their stories, but she asked no questions, gave no instructions—nor received traceable, recorded answers.
He regrets not making the Net more traceable, but he wouldn't have banned anonymity.
The centenary celebrations of Camus's birth have been disrupted by disagreements traceable to the old vexed question of Algeria.
